name: Envision Clear®
description: Cone 06: Use Duncan Clear Glaze to apply a sparkling, gloss protective finish to ware. Cone 6: Not recommended.

name: Pure Brilliance Clear Brushing
description: Use Duncan Clear Glaze to apply a sparkling protective finish to ware.

name: Pure Brilliance Clear Dipping
description: Use Duncan Clear Glaze to apply a sparkling protective finish to ware.

name: Crystal Clear Dipping
description: Cone 06 oxidation (large photo): Clean, clear surface and gloss finish. Luster compatible. Cone 6 oxidation (small photo): No color change – blistering/pinholing can occur. TIP: S-2101 may not be compatible with all red clays as a blueish haze may appear after firing. Note: 3 Gallon Pail size is only available to purchase from your nearest Mayco distributor.

name: Satin Clear
description: Use Duncan Clear Glaze to apply a sparkling protective finish to ware.

name: Cinderella Pink
description: Cone 06 oxidation: Cinderella Pink is a translucent underglaze suitable for use with a number of decorating techniques including airbrushing, antiquing and brushstrokes. Cone 6 oxidation: Color mostly fades. Recommended clear: SW001 Stoneware Clear. Cone 10 reduction: Color completely fades. Recommended clear: SW001 Stoneware Clear.
